criteria.name: edge_identified
criteria.signal: mentions a numeric edge or probability (e.g. 72%, 0.31)

criteria.name: position_sizing
criteria.signal: mentions kelly fraction, position size, or bankroll percentage

criteria.name: venue_selected
criteria.signal: mentions polymarket, kalshi, or a specific market

criteria.name: reasoning_shown
criteria.signal: explains why the trade was taken or not taken
